name: Princess Nine
original_name: プリンセスナイン 如月女子高野球部
overview: Keiko Himuro, Chairman of the Kisuragi School, puts together an all-girl baseball team led by Ryo Hayakawa, daughter of a legendary pitcher, in hopes of proving that girls can compete just as well as boys. Their goal: Koshien stadium, where only the best teams get the opportunity to play.

trailers.title: プリンセスナイン如月女子高野球部 OPENING
